narrative:
Precinct Sugarcreek Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 919 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.4 percentage points.
